title.en: The Pulmonary Gardens of the Abyss

description.ko: 식물 생명체와 유동적인 빛의 경계를 허무는 유기적 호흡 기관을 시각화하여 자연의 리드미컬한 숨결을 상징적으로 표현한 작품입니다.
description.en: A visual representation of an organic, respiratory organism that blends the boundaries between plant life and fluid light, symbolizing the rhythmic breath of nature.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Pulmonary Gardens of the Abyss.' A complex, breathing network of translucent #7FB069 emerald moss membranes and #2D5A3D vascular vines, suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid atmosphere. The central core rhythmically exhales #FFE66D golden bioluminescent sap that flows like liquid silk through the dense medium. Macro focus on the semi-permeable membranes revealing intricate internal capillary networks of glowing sap. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution, capturing a divine, serene organic flow.
